realism_anchors.name: skin_pores
realism_anchors.description: Visible pores on forehead, nose, and cheeks. Never smooth or airbrushed.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: visible skin pores on forehead and nose, natural skin texture with slight shine on T-zone

realism_anchors.name: stray_hairs
realism_anchors.description: Baby hairs at temples, flyaways catching backlight, imperfect part line.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: baby hairs at temples catching light, slight flyaways, imperfect hair part

realism_anchors.name: under_eye_texture
realism_anchors.description: Slight shadows, fine lines, natural discoloration under eyes.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: natural under-eye shadows, slight fine lines, subtle blue-purple undertone beneath eyes

realism_anchors.name: uneven_skin_tone
realism_anchors.description: Redness on nose/cheeks, sun damage variation, visible veins on temples.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: slight redness on nose and cheeks, natural skin tone variation, faint veins visible at temples

realism_anchors.name: fabric_texture
realism_anchors.description: Visible weave, wrinkles where body bends, pilling on worn fabrics.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: visible fabric weave texture, natural wrinkles at elbow and waist bends, realistic cloth drape

realism_anchors.name: environmental_noise
realism_anchors.description: 3+ real objects in background: charger cable, water bottle, earbuds, hair tie, etc.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: cluttered real background with everyday objects: charging cable, water bottle, hair tie on counter

realism_anchors.name: lighting_imperfection
realism_anchors.description: Mixed color temperatures, window overexposure, wall color cast.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: mixed warm and cool lighting, slight window overexposure, subtle color cast from walls

realism_anchors.name: camera_artifacts
realism_anchors.description: Shadow noise, edge softness, chromatic aberration, slight motion blur.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: slight noise in shadow areas, soft edges in background, subtle chromatic aberration

realism_anchors.name: nail_detail
realism_anchors.description: Cuticles visible, chipped polish, natural ridges on nails.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: visible cuticles, natural nail ridges, slightly chipped nail polish

realism_anchors.name: jewelry_physics
realism_anchors.description: Chains drape with gravity, earrings catch light unevenly, rings sit naturally.
realism_anchors.prompt_injection: jewelry draping naturally with gravity, earrings catching light unevenly, chain resting on collarbone
